          have h₁₁ := hz.2.2
          norm_num at h₁₁ ⊢ <;>
          (try cases h₁₁ <;> simp_all [h₁₁]) <;>
          (try nlinarith) <;>
          nlinarith [hdx]
        have h₁₁ : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ ^ 2 := by positivity
        have h₁₂ : (dx : ℝ) • ‖x‖ ^ 2 ≤ (dz * dx : ℝ) • ‖x‖ ^ 2 := by
          calc
            (dx : ℝ) • ‖x‖ ^ 2 = (dx : ℝ) * ‖x‖ ^ 2 := by simp [smul_eq_mul]
            _ ≤ (dz * dx : ℝ) * ‖x‖ ^ 2 := by
              have h₁₃ : (dx : ℝ) ≤ (dz * dx : ℝ) := by
                have h₁₄ := hz.2.2
                norm_num at h₁₄ ⊢ <;>
                (try cases h₁₄ <;> simp_all [h₁₄]) <;>
                (try nlinarith) <;>
                nlinarith [hdx]
              nlinarith
            _ = (dz * dx : ℝ) • ‖x‖ ^ 2 := by simp [smul_eq_mul]
        exact h₁₂
      calc
        re (inner x x) ≤ (dx : ℝ) • ‖x‖ ^ 2 := h₈
        _ ≤ (dz * dx : ℝ) • ‖x‖ ^ 2 := h₉
    simpa [smul_eq_mul] using h₇
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩
